company.name: Amphibio Ltd
company.notes: Environmental consulting / green building. Aligns with past Society for Protection of Nature work.

research.status_summary: Operational and stable — no acquisitions, layoffs, or funding events detected; website active as of 2026 and company continues delivering environmental consulting and green-building projects in Israel.
research.hiring_policy: No public job postings or formal hiring policy found; as a small Israeli boutique firm (revenue <$5M, core team of ~8–10 specialists) it supplements staff with external specialist advisers on a project basis, making visa sponsorship or EOR arrangements extremely unlikely.
recent_news: No Apr–Jun 2026 press releases, news articles, or LinkedIn announcements detected for Amphibio Ltd.
Company website (amphibio-ltd.co.il) shows a 2026 copyright notice, confirming the site is maintained and the firm is still active.
ZoomInfo flags 'very low activity levels' relative to peers in the Construction/Business Services sector, with no recent funding, product launches, or headcount changes surfaced.
research.growth_signal: Flat — small boutique firm with <$5M revenue and a stable ~8–10 person core team; no funding rounds, headcount expansion, or new product lines detected.
research.fit_for_lior: Weak fit — Amphibio is a domain-expert environmental consultancy with no technology product, no AI/data tooling track, and no indication of roles overlapping with Creative AI, Product Analysis, or Vibe Coding; the SPNI alignment is thematic but not actionable.
